name: Peppermint Tea
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the freshly-steeped hot tea into a teacup.
2. Add 1/4 teaspoon of peppermint extract to the tea.
3. Stir in 1 tablespoon of powdered artificial sweetener until dissolved.
4. Serve and enjoy your refreshing cup of peppermint tea, which provides approximately 5 calories and 1 gram of carbohydrates per serving.
